taskBrief: Tighten command authority, generated-page handling, and freshness repair guidance without collapsing wiki into forge policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Preserve wiki scope boundary, keep checkpoint and maintain authoritative, mention generated pages, and keep sync:local plus restart guidance only for skill edits.
repoContext: This repo uses wiki as the second-brain layer and forge as the SDLC layer. After editing skills/*/SKILL.md, run bun run sync:local, optionally bun run sync:local -- --audit, then restart the agent session.

taskBrief: Improve workflow-vs-repair routing so stale-page closeout or checkpoint debt routes to explicit maintenance commands rather than generic forge reruns.
acceptanceCriteria: Preserve command authority, keep forge as the workflow layer, prefer concrete repair commands when verify/close fails, and mention sync:local plus restart guidance only for applied skill changes.
repoContext: This repo uses wiki as the second-brain layer and forge as the SDLC layer. After editing skills/*/SKILL.md, run bun run sync:local, optionally bun run sync:local -- --audit, then restart the agent session.
